extraction.one_line_summary: DUMOULIN Tom attacked with 1km to go on Oropa climb, dropped QUINTANA with sustained power to take stage and extend GC lead by 24 seconds via bonuses
tactical_patterns: MOVISTAR burned ROJAS early to set pace for QUINTANA but rode too hard, self-destructing before key climb sections.
ZAKARIN attacked 6.2km out forcing multiple accelerations that isolated GC contenders before final kilometer selection.
DUMOULIN sitting on wheels until 1km mark reveals time trialists can win GC mountain stages by conserving rather than responding early.
YATES Adam dropped by DUMOULIN despite sitting on wheel shows pure TT power breaks traditional climbers even with drafting advantage.

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: Won mountain stage despite being primarily a time trialist, suggesting he's the complete GC package not just chrono specialist
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Lost 24 seconds despite teammates setting brutal early pace, unable to respond when DUMOULIN attacked in final kilometer
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: neutral: Strong enough to attack at 6.2km and animate race but lacked finishing power to hold off DUMOULIN's late acceleration
rider_signals.ROJAS JJ: negative: MOVISTAR domestique rode so hard on approach he opened gap to own team, tactical miscalculation of pacing
rider_signals.BALMER Thibault: negative: FDJ rider went backwards after team introduced climb, suggesting team burned too hot too early
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: Showed heart attacking mid-climb but completely finished before summit, poor energy management for stage profile
